_comment: Karmic Nexus registry. Lists all canon karmic nodes. Consumed by WorldStateEngine.queryWhoKnows() and queryWhyUntaken().

schema.karmic_weight: signed int; + = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer
schema.consequences: typed pointers to downstream effects; each has type/target_id/magnitude/resolved_at_tick
schema.unresolved_until: tick | condition | 'never' | 'resolved'; Prime Directive demands persistence
